document_id: 6.人工知能関連技術の研究開発及び活用の推進に関する法律.html

extracted_info.title: Act on the Promotion of Research, Development and Utilization of AI-related Technologies
key_requirements: Promote research and development of AI-related technologies as a foundation for economic and social development

Ensure the appropriate and effective utilization of AI-related technologies to significantly improve the efficiency and sophistication of administrative work and private business activities, as well as create new industries
Maintain Japan's capacity to conduct research and development of AI-related technologies and enhance the international competitiveness of the AI industry
